content: Simulating multiple reader perspectives through specialized beta-reader agents (romance-lens, fantasy-lens, craft-lens, sensitivity-lens, originality-lens) produces comprehensive feedback coverage for creative outputs. Each lens applies a distinct evaluation framework, and a synthesizer agent aggregates findings. This pattern is generalizable: any domain where output quality must be assessed from multiple stakeholder perspectives benefits from lens-based evaluation agents coordinated by a synthesizer. The 5-lens + synthesizer structure fit naturally under a depth-3 beta-reading coordinator with genre-lens and craft-lens sub-coordinators.
sourceEvidence: beta-reading-coordinator [coordinator] -> genre-lens-coordinator (romance-beta-reader, fantasy-beta-reader) + craft-lens-coordinator (craft-beta-reader, sensitivity-beta-reader, originality-beta-reader) + beta-synthesizer + beta-reading-auditor. 5 independent reader lenses feeding into a single synthesizer.

history.reason: Cold start — first observation from initial factory run
